# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that creates releases and publishes packages. On version tags, build the application, create a GitHub release, and publish to npm/PyPI. Make the release process fully automated so developers can just push tags to trigger releases.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Release

on:
  push:
    tags:
      - 'v*.*.*'

permissions:
  contents: write
  id-token: write

concurrency:
  group: release-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: false

jobs:
  build:
    name: Build application
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      version: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.version }}
      tag: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.tag }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Derive release metadata
        id: meta
        run: |
          TAG="${GITHUB_REF_NAME}"
          VERSION="${TAG#v}"
          echo "tag=${TAG}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "version=${VERSION}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
          registry-url: 'https://registry.npmjs.org'

      - name: Set up Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: '3.11'

      - name: Install Node dependencies
        if: ${{ hashFiles('package-lock.json') != '' || hashFiles('npm-shrinkwrap.json') != '' || hashFiles('yarn.lock') != '' || hashFiles('pnpm-lock.yaml') != '' }}
        run: |
          if [ -f package-lock.json ] || [ -f npm-shrinkwrap.json ]; then
            npm ci
          elif [ -f yarn.lock ]; then
            corepack enable
            yarn install --frozen-lockfile
          elif [ -f pnpm-lock.yaml ]; then
            corepack enable
            pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
          fi

      - name: Install Python build tooling
        if: ${{ hashFiles('pyproject.toml') != '' || hashFiles('setup.py') != '' || hashFiles('setup.cfg') != '' }}
        run: python -m pip install --upgrade build

      - name: Build application
        run: |
          if [ -f package.json ]; then
            npm run build --if-present
          fi
          if [ -f pyproject.toml ] || [ -f setup.py ] || [ -f setup.cfg ]; then
            python -m build
          fi

      - name: Pack npm artifact
        if: ${{ hashFiles('package.json') != '' }}
        run: npm pack

      - name: Collect release assets
        run: |
          mkdir -p release-assets
          if [ -d dist ]; then cp -r dist release-assets/dist; fi
          if ls ./*.tgz >/dev/null 2>&1; then cp ./*.tgz release-assets/; fi
          if [ -d build ]; then cp -r build release-assets/build; fi

      - name: Upload release assets
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: release-assets
          path: release-assets
          if-no-files-found: ignore

      - name: Upload python distributions
        if: ${{ hashFiles('dist/*') != '' }}
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: python-dist
          path: dist/*
          if-no-files-found: ignore

  github_release:
    name: Create GitHub release
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    steps:
      - name: Download release assets
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: release-assets
          path: release-assets
        continue-on-error: true

      - name: Create GitHub release
        env:
          GH_TOKEN: ${{ github.token }}
        run: |
          if [ -d release-assets ]; then
            gh release create "${{ needs.build.outputs.tag }}" release-assets/** \
              --title "${{ needs.build.outputs.tag }}" \
              --generate-notes
          else
            gh release create "${{ needs.build.outputs.tag }}" \
              --title "${{ needs.build.outputs.tag }}" \
              --generate-notes
          fi

  publish_npm:
    name: Publish to npm
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    if: ${{ hashFiles('package.json') != '' }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
          registry-url: 'https://registry.npmjs.org'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: |
          if [ -f package-lock.json ] || [ -f npm-shrinkwrap.json ]; then
            npm ci
          elif [ -f yarn.lock ]; then
            corepack enable
            yarn install --frozen-lockfile
          elif [ -f pnpm-lock.yaml ]; then
            corepack enable
            pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
          fi

      - name: Build package
        run: npm run build --if-present

      - name: Publish package
        env:
          NODE_AUTH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.NPM_TOKEN }}
        run: npm publish --access public

  publish_pypi:
    name: Publish to PyPI
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    if: ${{ hashFiles('pyproject.toml') != '' || hashFiles('setup.py') != '' || hashFiles('setup.cfg') != '' }}
    environment:
      name: pypi
      url: https://pypi.org/p/
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: '3.11'

      - name: Build distributions
        run: |
          python -m pip install --upgrade pip build
          python -m build

      - name: Publish to PyPI
        uses: pypa/gh-action-pypi-publish@release/v1
